pitchText:
Investment Overview – Clear Point (2 Bedroom)
 Mina Rashid, Dubai

Project Information:
* Project: Clear Point
* Developer: Emaar Development L.L.C
* Unit Type: 2 Bedroom
* Size: 1,187 sq. ft
* Selling Price: AED 2,700,000
* ECD (Expected Completion Date): Q3 2027
 Waterfront Lifestyle & Community Features (Mina Rashid):

 Direct marina access & yacht berths (accommodating yachts up to 100 metres)
 Private beach club with exclusive waterfront access 
 500-metre crystal lagoon / canal pool (Dubai’s longest)
 Exclusive waterfront promenade & boardwalk
 Luxury retail outlets & fine-dining restaurants along the marina 
 High-end infinity swimming pools & family-friendly splash zones
 Fully equipped gym, spa & wellness facilities 
 Interconnected district parks & landscaped green spaces 
 24/7 professional security, concierge support & hotel-style services

 Key Nearby Attractions:
* 2 minutes – Floating Yacht Club & Marina 
* 10 minutes – Sheikh Zayed Road 
* 15 minutes – Dubai International Airport 
* 20 minutes – Burj Khalifa & Downtown Dubai 

 Investment Highlights:
 Prime Emaar waterfront community
 Strong positive cashflow even at higher service charge levels
 High rental demand for 2BR units
 Excellent long-term capital appreciation potential
 Ideal for both end-use and income-focused investors
